description:
Trakt to Discord Rich Presence

Discrakt bridges your Trakt.tv watching status to Discord Rich Presence. It runs silently in your system tray and automatically updates your Discord status when watching movies or TV shows tracked by Trakt.tv.
What's Changed
- build(windows): statically link MSVC runtime by @afonsojramos in #240
- ci: replace archived actions-rs/clippy-check with direct cargo clippy by @afonsojramos in #241
- build: declare Cargo.toml rust-version MSRV 1.88 by @afonsojramos in #244
- ci: drop dead Rust version matrix in build.yml by @afonsojramos in #243
- ci: pin cache-apt-pkgs-action to v1.6.0 by @afonsojramos in #242
- ci: standardize Rust dep cache on Swatinem/rust-cache in release.yml by @afonsojramos in #245
- ci: install cargo-deb via prebuilt binary using taiki-e/install-action by @afonsojramos in #246
Full Changelog: v3.4.3...v3.4.4
